description: CompositionBlack V-neck sweater made of 100% acrylic, has full sleeves with ribbed cuffs and a ribbed hemFitRegularWash careWash separately using a mild detergentDo not bleachDrip dryWarm ironThis easy-to-wear sweater from jealous 21 adds a bold as brass look to your winter wardrobe. Show off your urban style in this fashionably tailored piece and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair this versatile knitwear with a mildly hued shirt and dark denims.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
